seoTitle: How to Get Your Freshdesk API Key
metaDescription: Learn where to find your Freshdesk API key so you can connect Freshdesk to other tools and build custom integrations.
intro: An API key lets you connect Freshdesk to external tools, scripts, or integrations without sharing your login credentials. This guide shows where to find your personal API key inside your Freshdesk profile.

steps.heading: Log in to Freshdesk
steps.body: Sign in with the account whose API key you want to retrieve.

steps.heading: Open your profile settings
steps.body: Click on your profile picture or name to access your personal settings page.

steps.heading: Locate the API key section
steps.body: Find the section labeled for your API key, usually shown alongside your contact and account details.

steps.heading: Copy the key securely
steps.body: Copy the API key and store it somewhere safe, since it grants access to your Freshdesk account through the API.

faq.question: Where is the Freshdesk API key located?
faq.answer: It's found on your individual profile settings page within your Freshdesk account.

faq.question: Is the API key the same for every agent?
faq.answer: No, each agent has their own unique API key tied to their account and permissions.

faq.question: Can I regenerate my API key?
faq.answer: Yes, if your key is compromised or you simply want a new one, Freshdesk allows you to regenerate it from the same settings page.

faq.question: Is it safe to share my API key?
faq.answer: No, your API key should be kept private since it can be used to access and modify your Freshdesk data.
